Available dogs

No inventory grid.

Available dogs change fast. We publish a profile only when the notes are current enough to protect the dog and the adopter.

Start the adoption gate Email adoption

Current status

Ask for today's adoptable dogs.

Before a dog gets a public profile, we verify the details that matter: name, age, breed, personality, rehab status, household requirements, deal-breakers, and current photos. Until then, start with the adoption gate or email the adoption inbox.

Who this dog isWho can adoptWho cannot adoptWhere they are in rehabPhotos that show current stateApplication route
Read the adoption filter
Four ways in

Pick the part of the work you can carry.

01 Adopt For prepared homes who can handle the truth before the form. 02 Foster Temporary homes where decompression and rehab can actually happen. 03 Volunteer Riverside hands for transport, walks, care work, and rescue logistics. 04 Give Monthly The Village gives the rescue a base before the next dog is in crisis.
Underdog Heroes

Riverside, California rescue for power-breed dogs most people already counted out.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
